old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.11","title":"Define and execute Meshtastic mobile app smoke-test script","description":"Why this exists: automated tests are insufficient; the actual standard mobile app must pair and exercise basic flows. What needs to be done: write the hardware/app smoke-test procedure for iOS/Android Meshtastic app against R1 Neo firmware, including firmware build/flash command, BLE discovery/pairing steps, expected screens, node info/status/config checks, send-message action, injected incoming-message/status action, and log capture. Execute it when project-LICHEN-avrb hardware access is resolved. Acceptance criteria: app version/date/device recorded; boot logs and app screenshots/log observations captured in Beads notes; pass/fail tied to project-LICHEN-ev5b.6; failures create exact blocker Beads with logs.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:25.393082Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:58.215736Z","labels":["zephyr","meshtastic","mobile-test","hardware","app-interface","firmware"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.11","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:25.393605Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.11","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T17:15:58.215736Z"}]}
